## [00:00 - 01:33]

This is a pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're going to talk about the future of detailed targeting. Let's go. Is detailed targeting dead? The argument to abandon detailed targeting grows stronger by the day. MENA has removed far more interest and behaviors over the years than they've added. And studies have shown that interests are not only incomplete, they're often inaccurate. If you use detailed targeting while optimizing for conversions, advantage detailed targeting is automatically turned on. That means that the audience has expanded and it's not as refined as you might think it is. There's also a push to go completely broad, removing all targeting but location. So is detailed targeting dead? As long as it still exists, that's going to be a case-by-case basis. Split-tested against going completely broad. If detailed targeting consistently gives you better results than going completely broad, keep using that approach. If not, this could be a wake-up call. You may be overthinking your targeting and you should just go broad. Personally, I've mostly abandoned detailed targeting. I still use some remarketing for warm audiences, but my cold targeting approach is almost always going broad now. How about you? Last call! So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok, do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here.
